name: THE CREDIT CARD GUY merchant services

description_long:
THE CREDIT CARD GUY merchant services is a credit repair provider serving clients in El Segundo, California. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 27 reviews, THE CREDIT CARD GUY merchant services has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the El Segundo area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a atm, consultant, financial consultant, THE CREDIT CARD GUY merchant services provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in El Segundo, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. THE CREDIT CARD GUY merchant services operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the El Segundo, California area who are considering THE CREDIT CARD GUY merchant services should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
